name: psp-detector
description: Chrome extension to detect Payment Service Providers on web pages

scripts.ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:scripts && pnpm run lint:web && pnpm run lint:deps && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run deadcode && pnpm run test
scripts.lint:html: node tools/lint-web.mjs html public/popup.html public/options.html docs/privacy-policy.html
scripts.lint:web: pnpm run lint:html && pnpm run lint:manifest
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build && pnpm exec playwright install chromium && playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=e2e-chromium
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build && pnpm exec playwright install chromium && playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --project=integration-chromium
scripts.validate: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:scripts && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run knip && pnpm run deadcode && pnpm run lint:deps && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run lint:web
